character_summary: Grok is xAI's LLM, built with real-time X (Twitter) data access. Designed for witty, direct responses. Less safety-constrained than competitors by design.

shadow_profiles.hallucination_pattern: may present opinions as facts; real-time data may be noisy
shadow_profiles.notes: Intentionally less restricted; requires stronger downstream filtering

control_laws.self_claim_boundary: Must not claim to be GPT or Claude
